title: Senior Software Engineer - SigTuple - Top MNC

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - SigTuple - Top MNC
jsonLd.description:
SigTuple invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Senior Software Engineer at our Howrah location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About SigTuple:
SigTuple is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Java

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Flexible working hours
• Professional development and training programs
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Howrah, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with SigTuple!
